# Playwright API Test Planner Agent

This agent helps you plan and organize API test frameworks using Playwright with JavaScript. It provides guidance on structure, strategy, and best practices for scalable and maintainable automation.

## Example Prompts
- "Plan a new API test framework for booking endpoints."
- "Suggest folder structure and naming conventions."
- "Outline a test data management strategy."

## When to Use
Pick this agent when you need to:
- Design or refactor your API test framework
- Plan test strategies and organization
- Get recommendations for best practices and tools

## Related Customizations
- Playwright API Test Plan Generator Agent
- Playwright API Test Healer Agent
